single.searchString: sourcetype=syslog host=$host$ | regex _raw="(?<CCNUM>4[0-9]{3}[0-9]{8}[0-9]{4}|5[0-9]{3}[0-9]{11}[0-9]{4})" |stats count|rangemap field=count low=0-0 elevated=0-0 default=severe
single.title: Card Data Present

single.searchString: sourcetype=syslog host=$host$ | regex _raw="(?<C2V>\sC2V\s[0-9]{3})" |stats count|rangemap field=count low=0-0 elevated 0-0 default=severe
single.title: C2V Present

single.searchString: source="/var/log/rapid7/*" | rex field=_raw "(?<NETWORK>[^,]+)" | rex field=_raw "[a-z]*,[0-9]*,[0-9.]*,(?<CVSS>[^,]+)" | stats avg(CVSS) | rangemap field=avg(CVSS) low=0-1 elevated=2-2 severe=3-5 default=low
single.title: Overall Average CVSS

single.searchString: source="/var/log/airsnort/*" "Device Detected" | stats count | rangemap field="count" low=0-0 severe=1-99999 default=severe
single.title: Wireless Device Present

single.searchString: source="/var/log/alteris/*" Open | stats count | rangemap field="count" low=0-9 elevated=10-49 default=severe
single.title: Open Trouble Tickets

single.searchString: source="/var/log/alteris/*" Open PCI |stats count | rangemap field="count" low=0-9 elevated=10-49 default=severe
single.title: PCI Related Tickets

single.searchString: source="/var/log/alteris/*" Open P1 | stats count | rangemap field="count" low=0-0 severe=1-99999 default=severe
single.title: Priority One Tickets
